contextBanner: [TBG | Operator Terminal Environment | coordinator/toolchain architecture | branch: docs/agent-skills-stale-pr-cherry-pick]
purpose: Define how WezTerm and adjacent terminal/editor/session tools support BlacksmithGuild operator and agent workflows without becoming repo runtime dependencies.

sourceTools.name: WezTerm
sourceTools.role: GPU-accelerated cross-platform terminal emulator and multiplexer candidate for the Windows operator shell
sourceTools.adoptionBoundary: external operator environment; not vendored, not required for runtime proof, not committed as machine-local config

sourceTools.name: tmux
sourceTools.role: persistent session backend candidate for Unix/WSL or Firstmate-style session management
sourceTools.adoptionBoundary: optional backend; do not assume native Windows availability

sourceTools.name: Neovim
sourceTools.role: terminal editor fallback for keyboard-first code review and small edits

sourceTools.name: voice input
sourceTools.role: prompt throughput aid that should feed structured sprint packets
sourceTools.adoptionBoundary: operator ergonomics; no dictated private data should be committed

allowedScope: documenting terminal/session topology for local repo operation
documenting how ForgeAgentStatus and future tbg-axi output should behave in terminal panes
classifying WezTerm as an operator shell candidate in the agentic operations layer
recording pane/session names, command groups, and packet relay expectations as repo-safe examples
keeping terminal ergonomics separate from runtime proof and gameplay behavior
forbiddenScope: installing WezTerm, tmux, Neovim, or voice tools during a documentation sprint
committing user-specific terminal configuration, fonts, shell history, tokens, screenshots, or local logs
making WezTerm a hard dependency for BlacksmithGuild validators or runtime proof
claiming runtime proof from terminal/session organization
editing runtime gameplay, launcher, command inbox, or save files under terminal-environment scope

orderedSteps.name: classify_terminal_role
requiredEvidence: tool name and source repo or docs
explicit statement that the tool is external to BlacksmithGuild

orderedSteps.name: map_repo_commands
requiredEvidence: ForgeAgentStatus or future tbg-axi commands expected to run well in the terminal
artifact or PR relay path for long output

orderedSteps.name: define_session_topology
requiredEvidence: which lanes may share a terminal workspace
which runtime or evidence lanes require isolation

orderedSteps.name: validate_boundary
requiredEvidence: no external tool installation performed unless explicitly owned

requires: WezTerm recorded as first-class operator shell candidate
terminal tooling kept outside repo runtime dependencies
ForgeAgentStatus or tbg-axi terminal ergonomics described
no personal terminal config or generated logs committed
git diff --check passes or exact local blocker is recorded
